title: 30Pcs 18 Inch Large Blue Round Shape Foil Balloons Big Blue Circle Helium Mylar Ballons for Birthday Wedding Bridal Shower Anniversary Engagement Party Decorations Supplies
features: Party Must-Have: Our round foil balloons are a must-have to brighten up a party.Beautifully designed, these round balloons are a versatile decoration for any celebration, making your party shine.The product is for ages18 and up only
PACKAGE CONTENT: You will get 30pcs 18inch round foil balloons with 2pcs straw and 2pcs ribbon in a wide range of quantities to suit your decorating needs.

EASY TO INFLATE AND DISPLAY: Our mylar round balloons are very easy to inflate and arrange, simply inflate the balloon with helium and hang it on a stand, on a wall or make a balloon bouquet, or hang it from the ceiling.

PRODUCT-QUALITY : Our round mylar balloons are made of good quality aluminum foil, which is resistant and also reusable. It stays inflated and in shape throughout the activity, allowing you to enjoy the celebration without worrying about deflated balloons. The aluminum foil also creates a shiny and eye-catching look that enhances the overall visual appeal of the decorations.

WIDE RANGE OF USES: To catch the great moment with our photogenic round aluminum foil balloons! Whether you're hosting a birthday party, anniversary, bridal shower or planning graduation parties, wedding receptions and holiday gatherings, these round balloons will create a stunning visual effect that will To catch the attention of all your guests.
